info.name: AQDI Admin API (full)
info.description:
All routes under `/api/admin` from `routes/admin.php`.

Set collection variables:
- **baseUrl** — e.g. `http://localhost:8000` or your API host
- **employee_token** — Bearer token from `POST /api/admin/employees/login`

Routes using Sanctum: Employees (except login), Order comments.

item.name: List orders — not received only (legacy param)
